note: Contributor-chart config, read by tools/chaos_db_ci.py. 'aliases' collapse one person's many git identities (email/name vary per machine + per squash) into a single canonical GitHub login. 'overrides' force a specific src file to a login when the git-add author is wrong (e.g. work landed via a maintainer's consolidating PR/squash). Fix names here, never hand-edit contributions.json.
